mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRIPDETAIL ( TRIP_CONTS_ID, TRIPDTL_INFO, TRIPDTL_DYOFF_YMD, TRIPDTL_PRK_PSBLTY, TRIPDTL_OPER_HR, TRIPDTL_TEL, TRIPDTL_STROLLER, TRIPDTL_PET, TRIPDTL_CRG, TRIPDTL_HMPG ) VALUES ( #{tripContsId}, #{tripdtlInfo}, #{tripdtlDyoffYmd}, #{tripdtlPrkPsblty}, #{tripdtlOperHr}, #{tripdtlTel}, #{tripdtlStroller}, #{tripdtlPet}, #{tripdtlCrg}, #{tripdtlHmpg} )
mapper.select: SELECT TRIP_CONTS_ID, TRIPDTL_INFO, TRIPDTL_DYOFF_YMD, TRIPDTL_PRK_PSBLTY, TRIPDTL_OPER_HR, TRIPDTL_TEL, TRIPDTL_STROLLER, TRIPDTL_PET, TRIPDTL_CRG, TRIPDTL_HMPG, TRIPDTL_REG, TRIPDTL_MOD FROM TRIPDETAIL WHERE TRIP_CONTS_ID = #{tripContsId}
